title: Kale Consultants is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Kale Consultants is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Kale Consultants family as a Full Stack Developer in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Kale Consultants:
Kale Consultants is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kale Consultants!
